hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Tremor to Ultra-Tremor.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra Tremor: DEF is treated as 0 when taking damage; reduces active skill damage by 40%. Gains 2 Weak and removes this effect after using an active skill.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Applies #Entry_1# to an enemy for 1 turn, and then deals #Factor_1# damage to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Applies #Entry_1# to an enemy for 1 turn, and then deals #Factor_1# damage to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Tremor: DEF is treated as 0 when taking damage; reduces active skill damage by 20%. Gains 1 Weak and removes this effect after using an active skill.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra Tremor: DEF is treated as 0 when taking damage; reduces active skill damage by 40%. Gains 2 Weak and removes this effect after using an active skill.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1145_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] When an allied No Organization character uses an active skill, grants the character the following effects for 1 turn based on the skill level: Lv.1 - Increases PEN Rate by 15%; Lv.2 - Increases ATK by 8%; Lv.3 - Increases damage dealt by 10% and reduces damage taken by 20%.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] When an allied No Organization character uses an active skill, grants the character the following effects for 1 turn based on the skill level: Lv.1 - Increases PEN Rate by 15%; Lv.2 - Increases ATK by 8%; Lv.3 - Increases damage dealt by 10% and reduces damage taken by 20%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1145_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] Increases basic stats of allied No Organization characters by 16% and Block Rate by 12%. When battle starts, grants #Entry_1# to allied No Organization characters.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] Increases basic stats of allied No Organization characters by 16% and Block Rate by 12%. When battle starts, grants #Entry_1# to allied No Organization characters.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Premeditation: Deals extra damage equal to 8% of the caster's initial max HP when attacking.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Premeditation: Deals extra damage equal to 8% of the caster's initial max HP when attacking.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1145_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] When your turn starts, heals the ally with the lowest HP percentage for 10% of max HP, and reduces damage taken from the next active skill by 50% for the target. If all allies are at full HP after the healing, increases damage dealt by the next active skill of all allies by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] When your turn starts, heals the ally with the lowest HP percentage for 10% of max HP, and reduces damage taken from the next active skill by 50% for the target. If all allies are at full HP after the healing, increases damage dealt by the next active skill of all allies by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst reduces all enemies' ATK by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst reduces all enemies' ATK by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1145_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] Increases basic stats of allied No Organization characters by 16% and Block Rate by 12%. When battle starts, grants #Entry_1# to allied No Organization characters.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] Increases basic stats of allied No Organization characters by 16% and Block Rate by 12%. When battle starts, grants #Entry_1# to allied No Organization characters.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Ultra Premeditation: Deals extra damage equal to 15% of the caster's initial max HP when attacking.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra Premeditation: Deals extra damage equal to 15% of the caster's initial max HP when attacking.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_weak_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Applying Weak reduces the target's Basic Stats by 5% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Applying Weak reduces the target's Basic Stats by 5% for 1 turn.
